trace:
--- Round 1 ---
<think>The question asks for "全聚德一年内到期的非流动资产是多少？" (What is Quanjude's non-current assets due within one year?).

Looking at the document map, DOC1 is the 2024 Q1 report for 中国全聚德(集团)股份有限公司 (China Quanjude Group Co., Ltd.).

Anchor DOC1_A7 specifically mentions: "合并资产负债表显示，截至2024年3月31日，货币资金为107,944,049.42元，交易性金融资产为30,131,095.89元。一年内到期的非流动资产期末余额为15,491.66元，期初余额为113,843.56元。"

This directly answers the question. The value for "一年内到期的非流动资产" (non-current assets due within one year) is 15,491.66元 at the end of the period (2024年3月31日).

I should open DOC1_A7 to get the exact verbatim text for the answer.</think>
<search>{"action":"open","anchor_id":"DOC1_A7","expected_evidence":"一年内到期的非流动资产的期末余额数值"}</search>

--- Round 2 ---
<think>The question asks for "全聚德一年内到期的非流动资产是多少？" (What is Quanjude's non-current assets due within one year?).

From the opened anchor DOC1_A7, I can see the exact value in the consolidated balance sheet table:

|一年内到期的非流动资产|15,491.66|113,843.56|

The ending balance (期末余额) is 15,491.66元, and the beginning balance (期初余额) is 113,843.56元.

This is the exact evidence needed to answer the question. The document is clearly about 中国全聚德(集团)股份有限公司 (China Quanjude Group Co., Ltd.), which matches the question about "全聚德".

I have found the relevant evidence. I should now stop and provide the answer with the verbatim text from the document.</think>
<search>{"action":"stop","reason":"found the exact value for 一年内到期的非流动资产 in the consolidated balance sheet"}</search>
<answer>"一年内到期的非流动资产|15,491.66|113,843.56"</answer>
